sn48.56:1.1: “Monks, when one quality is established in a monk, the five faculties are developed & developed well.
sn48.56:1.5: There is the case where a monk guards his mind with regard to effluents and qualities accompanied by effluents.
sn48.56:1.6: When his mind is guarded with regard to effluents and mental qualities accompanied by effluents, the faculty of conviction goes to the culmination of its development.
sn48.56:1.10: discernment goes to the culmination of its development.
sn48.56:1.11: “This is how when one quality is established in a monk, the five faculties are developed & developed well.”
